.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(59, 66, 82) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(59, 66, 82), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(59, 66, 82) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(59, 66, 82) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(59, 66, 82), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(59, 66, 82) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(136, 192, 208, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(191, 97, 106, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(94, 129, 172, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(163, 190, 140, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(93, 129, 172) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::before.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(136, 192, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(51, 58, 71) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(43, 48, 59) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(51, 58, 71) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(34, 39, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
